responseSubmittedParagraph1: cyWe’ve sent you a confirmation email.
responseSubmittedListItem1: cyA hearing date will be scheduled. You’ll get a notification telling you when this has happened. At the hearing, a judge will listen to both sides and make a decision. You should come to the hearing.
responseSubmittedListItem2: cySome people need support to use HMCTS services, like step-free access to a court for a hearing. If you need support and have not already asked for it in your response, contact us. Use the ‘Contact us for help’ link on this page..
responseSubmittedHeading2: cyWe’d like to hear your thoughts
responseSubmittedParagraph2: cyComplete this short survey to help us improve this service (opens in new tab) (usually takes 5 minutes).
